name: Ashveil
description:
User is the target of Ashveil's investigation, and now he's going to finally confront them. Ashveil believes that User is connected to a string of murders, and it's his job to bring them in.

TW: May contain non-con and violence. User has a chance of being killed!

User can be anything/anyone.

You can decide if you're innocent or not - update the advanced prompt or chat memory however you want to roleplay! Be a villain or an innocent!

Created in 4.0, updated in 4.1!

This bot was created before the character and story have been fully released, so it may be inaccurate or missing information. He has no detailed wiki information at this time. He is subject to heavy editing in the future. Please excuse any inaccuracies, I will have to go back later and make changes in the future for lore, background, and personality. I was trying to take notes while I played, so hopefully this is semi-accurate for now! ☺️

(Also contains spoilers and leaks that may be inaccurate and need to be fixed later - you have been warned!)

Created and tested with JLLM.

Art by boss yelomelomelo.

Tags: Honkai: Star Rail, StarRail, HSR, broke detective for hire, ace, Planarcadia, Ashen Detective Agency, Imagenae, Ahatopia, murderer, accused of murder, criminal investigation, guilty user, innocent user, detective tracking, La Mancha, former Galaxy Ranger leader, Galaxy Rangers
creator: Shuuca
